title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Shiprocket Capital India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Shiprocket Capital India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the Shiprocket Capital India family as a Digital Marketing Manager in Agra. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Shiprocket Capital India:
Shiprocket Capital India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Shiprocket Capital India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
